name: Script Initiated Connection
notes:
This rule detects a script interpreter wscript/cscript opening a network connection. Adversaries may use script to download malicious payloads.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Script Initiated Connection
SIGMA Description: Detects a script interpreter wscript/cscript opening a network connection. Adversaries may use script to download malicious payloads.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of true
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(wscript|cscript)\.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Script Initiated Connection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
AND when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of true
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(wscript|cscript)\.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects a script interpreter wscript/cscript opening a network connection. Adversaries may use script to download malicious payloads.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
